sql_array: CREATE TABLE fuzz_test (id UInt32, value_x Float64, value_y Float64) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO fuzz_test (id, value_x, value_y) VALUES (1, 10.5, 5.5), (2, -12.3, 4.5), (3, 6.7, -8.1);
UPDATE fuzz_test SET value_y = value_y + 2 WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, covarPop(value_x, value_y) AS population_covariance FROM fuzz_test GROUP BY id;
